flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Massachusetts-Boston fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Massachusetts-Boston rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (26.8% → 32.5%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at University of Massachusetts-Boston rose 10% between 2006 and 2009 (70.0% → 77.2%).
